role: Prompt assembly and orchestration layer for ArchSpine's AI agent interactions.
responsibility: Provides utilities and facades for building structured prompts (markdown, source code analysis) using a fluent builder, shared output contracts, and localization support.

children.role: Prompt assembly utility class that orchestrates the rendering of structured prompt blocks for AI agent interactions.
Infrastructure facade for constructing a localized markdown-only prompt string from semantic JSON input, leveraging PromptBuilder and shared instruction utilities.
Utility module generating the formatted OUTPUT CONTRACT string and associated language/markdown guidance for the ArchSpine prompt response system.
Infrastructure facade function for generating structured LLM prompts for source code analysis and validation tasks within the ArchSpine semantic layer.
TypeScript type definition module for ArchSpine's prompt generation and response formatting protocol.
